name: SONIC ARTS
heading: SONIC ARTS
description: Extension for music, audio, and sound design projects. Covers composition, production, mixing, mastering, and sonic aesthetics.

name: NARRATIVE CREATIVE
heading: NARRATIVE CREATIVE
description: Extension for storytelling, fiction, and narrative-driven projects. Covers plot structure, character development, world-building, and narrative voice.

name: LYRICAL CRAFT
heading: LYRICAL CRAFT
description: Extension for songwriting, poetry, and lyrical composition. Covers rhyme, meter, imagery, emotional arc, and lyrical devices.

name: VISUAL STORYTELLING
heading: VISUAL STORYTELLING
description: Extension for film, video, animation, and visual media projects. Covers visual narrative, cinematography, editing, and visual aesthetics.

name: STRATEGIC PLANNING
heading: STRATEGIC PLANNING
description: Extension for business strategy, product planning, and organizational projects. Covers goals, metrics, stakeholder analysis, and roadmap planning.

name: SYSTEM DESIGN
heading: SYSTEM DESIGN
description: Extension for software architecture, system design, and technical infrastructure projects. Covers components, interfaces, data flow, and scalability.
